verses.text: Tua ciangin Josef a pa' tungah pukin, ama tungah kap a, amah a nam hi
A pa a muatlohna dingin a bawl dingin Josef in a nasem zatui siamte thu pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin zatui siamte in zatui tawh Israel a bawl uh hi
Zatui tawh bawlna nasep hun tampi kisam a, ni sawmli sung sep ding kisam hi. Egypt mite ama hangin ni sawmsagih sung a kap uh hi
Ama hangin kahna hun a bei ciangin Josef in Faro' innkuante kiangah, “Tu-in note' mai-ah maipha ka ngah leh Faro' kiangah thu nong va gensak ding uh kong thum hi

Ka pa in kei hong kiciamsak a, ‘Kei a si ding ka hi ta hi. Kanaan leitangah kei-a' dingin ka khuatsa han sungah kei nong vui ding hi,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kei hong paito sak in la, ka pa hong vui sak in, ci-in kong thum hi. Tua ciangin kei kong ciahkik ding hi, ci hi, va cihsak un,” a ci hi
Faro in dawngin, “Paito in la, nang hong kiciamsak bangin na pa va vui in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin a pa a vui dingin Josef paito hi. Amah tawh Faro' nasemte khempeuh, a innsung upate, Egypt gam upate khempeuh zong
Josef' innkuante khempeuh, a sanggamte, a pa' innkuante bangmahin paito uh hi. A tate uh, a tuuhonte uh leh a ganhing honte bek uh Goshen gamah kinusia hi
Tua lai munah amah tawh leengte leh sakol tuangte zong paikhawm to uh hi. Tua lai-a paite tam mahmah hi
Amaute Jordan gun galkhat, Atad' buhcilna phual a tun' uh ciangin, nakpi takin dahna tawh a thuum uh hi. Amah in a pa' hangin ni sagih sung dahna hun a bawl hi

Tua gama teng Kanaan mite in, Atad' buhcilna-ah tua banga kahna a muh ciangin amaute in, “Hih pen Egypt mite-a' dingin a nasia mahmah thuumna ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Abelmizraim, kici hi. Tua mun pen Jordan gun galkhat ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute a thupiak bangin ama tapate in ama-a' dingin bawlsak uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh ama tapate in Kanaan gamah amah pua-in, kivuina ding muna neih dingin Abraham in Hit mi Efron' tung panin a lo tawh a leikhop, Mamre nisuahna lamah a om, Makpelah mun lo sunga leihawm sungah a vui uh hi
Josef in a pa a vui khit ciangin, a sanggamte leh a pa a vui dingin amah a zui khempeuhte tawh Egypt-ah a ciahkik hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Josef in A Sanggamte tungah Kip gen pha kik

verses.text: Josef' sanggamte in a pa uh a sih khit ciangin, “Josef in eite hong mudahin ama tunga siatna i bawl khempeuh hong thukkik khading hi,” ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Josef kiangah thu puak uh a, “I pa in a sih ma-in thu hong pia a

‘Josef kiangah hih bangin ci un: Na sanggamte' thupalsatna leh a khialhna na maisak in, kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang' tungah amaute in siatna hong bawl uh hi,’ ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang' tungah kong thum uh hi. I pa' Pasian' nasemte' thupalsatna hong maisak in,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in ama kiangah tua bangin thu a gen ciangun Josef a kap hi
A sanggamte zong pai-in ama mai-ah puk uh a, “En in, kote, nangma nasemte ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Josef in amaute kiangah, “Lau kei un. Kei, Pasian' za-ah om ka hi hiam
Note in ahih leh, kei' tungah a sia dingin na ngaihsun uh hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in tuhuna mah bangin mi tampite a nuntak theihna a pian'na dingin a hoih dingin a ngaihsut ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin lau kei un. Note leh na tate uh-a' dingin an kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah in tua bangin kip gen pha kikin amaute a hehnem hi.
Tua ahih ciangin Josef, amah leh a pa' innkuante tawh Egypt-ah teng uh a, Josef kum za leh kum sawm nungta hi
Josef in khang thumna ahi Efraim' tate mu hi. Manasseh' tapa Makhir' tate zong Josef' innsung mahah suak uh hi

Josef in a sanggamte kiangah, “Kei a si ding ka hi ta hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in note hong kem ding a, hih leitang panin amah in Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob tunga a ciamsa leitangah note hong paikhiatpih to ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Josef in Israel tapate' kiciamna bawlin, “Pasian in note hong kem ding a, note in hih lai panin ka guhte na pua to ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin kum za leh kum sawm a pha-in Josef a si hi. Amaute in a muatlohna dingin zatui tawh amah bawl uh a, Egypt-ah hankuang sung khatah amah kikoih hi.
